'''Hannah Balmor''' was the second wife of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Haaran Balmor]] and lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Damualer Triac]]. She did not like a holographic painting her husband had made of a [[Divoran holochess|Divoran Holochess]] board, as the simulated reflections in the twisted shapes of the pieces led her to stare at it for hours without making sense of it.<ref name="DHP" />
